title: Read the Rhythm
theme: danger keeps time, and time can be read
learningGoal: observe a hazard cycle fully before committing the one jump rather than reacting mid-air
mentalModel: every timed hazard has a period, and the gap between beats is the only safe window
misconceptions: a beam that is off now will stay off long enough
moving danger can always be out-run by jumping sooner
subversion: the beam you timed turns lethal exactly as a habitual early jump would land
optimizationFocus: entering the gap on the earliest safe beat rather than the most obvious later one
finalExam: thread a desynchronised laser and a moving hazard on a single well-timed jump

levelSlots.intentSentence: Spend the one jump on the decisive observation read because the bare corridor offers no help and a habitual early commitment falls into the pit.
levelSlots.oneJumpDecision: where along the approach to spend the only jump given what the level reveals

levelSlots.intentSentence: Spend the one jump on the decisive timing read because the laser reshapes the approach and a habitual early commitment falls into the pit.
